_note: Confirm template: a text message with exactly 2 action buttons (yes/no style). 'text' max: 240 chars. 'actions' must have exactly 2 items. No image support. Useful for simple binary confirmations (cancel order, confirm booking, etc.). When the user taps a button, a postback event (for postback actions) or a message event (for message actions) fires — not a 'template_postback' event.

messages.altText: Confirm cancellation — reply Yes or No

template.text: Are you sure you want to cancel your order #12345?
